items.name: AndroidIDE
items.description: AndroidIDE is an IDE for Android to develop full featured Android apps.

items.name: Android-AdvancedWebView
items.description: Enhanced WebView component for Android that works as intended out of the box

items.name: CodenameOne
items.description: Cross-platform framework for building truly native mobile apps with Java or Kotlin. Write Once Run Anywhere support for iOS, Android, Desktop & Web.

items.name: HydraLab
items.description: Intelligent cloud testing made easy.

items.name: selendroid
items.description: "Selenium for Android" (Test automate native or hybrid Android apps and the mobile web with Selendroid.) Join us on IRC #selendroid on freenode. Also confirm you have signed the CLA http://goo.gl/pAvxEI when making a Pull Request.
